description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure is carved from a dark, wood-like material, with simplified anatomical features such as a rounded head, prominent chest, and blocky legs. The arms are short and extend slightly away from the body, while the head features a crest or headdress that adds to its distinctive silhouette. The surface of the sculpture is matte and shows visible grain and texture, suggesting hand-carved craftsmanship. The overall form is abstracted, with minimal facial details and geometric proportions, evoking traditional or tribal artistic influences.
description: A dark, stylized wooden human figure with a crest-like headdress, standing on a rectangular base. The sculpture features simplified, geometric anatomy and a textured, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal anatomy, including the chest, face, and both legs clearly, with the crest on the head visible.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the back, left arm, and the curvature of the body, with the crest and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back, the shape of the head and crest, and the blocky legs, with minimal detail on the face.
description_view_3: Right front three-quarter view showing the right side of the face, chest, and arm, with the crest and base also visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museo Nacional de Historia Natural de Chile
